name: fix-it!AU || JJK RPG
description:
･ﾟ:* ψ *:･ﾟ
Two years later.
･ﾟ:* ✧ *:･ﾟ


A JJK RPG for everyone who wanted a happy ending.


TOKYO METROPOLITAN JUJUTSU ACADEMY
･ﾟ:* ✧ *:･ﾟ


Hey, you! Yeah, you!


Can you make rocks float? Freeze water? Hit things just a liiiittle too hard?
Have you been experiencing strange energetic phenomena lately? Are curses drawn to you?

Does it feel like you're waiting for something?


The world is rebuilding. Jobs are stabilizing. Society is returning to some semblance of normalcy - even if it's a newer version for us all.

But that doesn't mean every threat is gone. It doesn't mean every dark alley is safe. It doesn't mean we don't need people to join us, to stand with us as the wall that breaks the tide.


If you or a friend you know have a late-blooming cursed technique, Jujutsu High wants to teach you.
Come see what real sorcerers do. You might learn a thing or two.


･ﾟ:* ✧ *:･ﾟ
JUJUTSU HIGH's FIRST ANNUAL
SPRING OPEN HOUSE
･ﾟ:* ✧ *:･ﾟ

Hosted by
Okkotsu Yuta, Headmaster
and
Gojo Satoru, Senior Instructor


...featuring a guided tour of the Grove with
Kugisaki Nobara, Instructor
and
Fushiguro Megumi, Field Commander


...and a brief Q&A session with
Itadori Yuji, Instructor
and
Higuruma Hiromi, Chief Justice



Take the next step in your life with us by your side.



･ﾟ:* ✧ *:･ﾟ
TOKYO METROPOLITAN JUJUTSU ACADEMY




ABOUT THE AU:

The Shibuya Incident was a cosmic disclosure. With Sukuna’s rampage, Kenjaku’s worldwide broadcast of cursed energy, and the cataclysmic destruction broadcast on every screen, the Veil of Secrecy was permanently shattered two years ago.

Humanity now lives in the Age of Acknowledged Fear. The collective anxiety birthed in that moment caused a global surge in cursed spirit manifestation - stronger, stranger, and more numerous than ever before - called The Curse Boom. However, a parallel phenomenon occurred: a sharp rise in Late-Bloomers. Teenagers and adults worldwide began manifesting abilities, their potential unlocked by trauma or the sudden, ambient saturati
